result.stdout:
Description:
  Sorts elements in a resx file

Usage:
  ResxSorter [command] [options]

Options:
  -i, --input-file <input-file> (REQUIRED)  The input resx file
  -o, --output-file <output-file>           The output file.
  -f, --force                               Always write the output, even if there is no change.
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information
  --version                                 Show version information

Commands:
  no-op  No operation
